name: CLX - CIRO Calendar Conflict Detector v1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ module_name: $json.module_name, alert_type: $json.alert_type, severity: $json.severity, title: $json.title, message: $json.message, details: $json.details, aggregation_key: $json.aggregation_key, triggered_at: $json.triggered_at, status: $json.status }) }}
